goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should 'arrive by 17:45'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'mutliple sports' and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on sunday
The train should go to london liverpool street and should arrive by 17:45
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of mutliple sports and should be in the centre
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of museum
Make sure you get postcode and entrance fee
